blocks.content: I was at the steps before practice ended. I don't know what I was going to say if she wasn't there. I didn't plan for that.
I sat down on the steps. I told myself I was just resting. I was not just resting.
She said it quiet. Not surprised. Just noting it.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Ms. Okafor kept us. She does that.
She sat down next to me. Not across from me, not a step away — right next to me, close enough that I could tell she'd been in somewhere warm.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I would have texted but I don't have your number.
I heard what she'd just said. She would have texted. She wanted to.
I did not give her my number.
I don't know why I did not give her my number. I know why. I just don't know how to say the reason without it sounding small.
